_meta.description: List all users in the Okta admin console. Navigates to /admin/users and reads the full user table. Returns name, email, and status for all users.

auth.note: Okta OAuth PKCE — session must already be active. If redirected to /oauth2/v1/authorize, tell the user to log in and retry.

search_term.description: Optional: filter by name or email. Leave blank for all users.

_meta.note_params: IMPORTANT: {{base_url}} in chain steps is resolved from API-call params, NOT from payload.params. When calling via /run directly, pass params={"base_url": "https://trial-8689388-admin.okta.com"} explicitly, OR use the hardcoded URL (chains already use hardcoded URL as of this version).

chain.note: Navigate to Okta admin users page
Wait for MUI table to fully render

Read the users table. Confirmed schema: headers=[Person & username, Primary email, Status], rowCount=7. Known users: Hermes AI, Perplexity AI, ChatGPT OpenAI, Grok xAI, Gemini Google, Claude Anthropic, Michael Wolf. NOTE: If read returns empty, the MUI table may not have re-rendered after same-URL navigation. Consider navigating to /admin/users from a different page first, or use a wait_for on the table element.
